name: a pluralized signal form such as microservices still matches its workload type
command: T=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a fleet of independent microservices" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts (JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["workload_types"]).join(",")'); echo "$T" | grep -qE 'rest-api' && echo plural-signal-matches 1>&2
